fields.name: Necessary Cookies
fields.description: These cookies are essential for the website to function properly, including session handling for administrators and saving filter preferences.

fields.name: Giveaway Cookies
fields.description: These cookies store your email address when you participate in our giveaways.

fields.name: sessionid
fields.description: Django session cookie for maintaining user sessions, particularly for admin access.

fields.name: filter_preferences
fields.description: Stores user filter position preferences for better browsing experience.

fields.name: giveaway_email
fields.description: Stores email address for giveaway participation.
